mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sp_role WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sp_role WHERE code = #{code} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sp_role WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sp_role (name, code, description, is_system, is_enabled) VALUES (#{name}, #{code}, #{description}, #{isSystem}, #{isEnabled})
mapper.update: UPDATE sp_role SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sp_role WHERE code = #{code} AND is_deleted = 0
